title: Requirements Document for Attachment Upload Feature
response:
Critical Alignment Issues Found

  The requirements document has fundamental misalignments with existing project specifications:

  Major Problems:

  1. File Types: Document specifies (PDF, JPEG, PNG, DOC, DOCX, XLS, XLSX)
    - Reality: Business logic requires PDF, PNG, JPEG/JPG, IMG only
  2. File Size: Document specifies 10MB limit
    - Reality: System enforces 5MB per file maximum
  3. Missing Google Drive Structure: No mention of required folder pattern
    - Reality: Must use /Mavericks Claims/{claimUuid}/ structure
  4. Missing Domain Restriction: No @mavericks-consulting.com requirement
    - Reality: Critical security constraint throughout system
  5. Status Flow Incomplete: Missing failed status handling
    - Reality: draft → sent ↔ paid with failed intermediary state
  6. Database Schema Mismatch: Doesn't align with existing AttachmentEntity

  Action Required:

  The requirements document needs substantial revision to align with existing project specifications before approval.

  Should I:
  1. Fix the requirements document to match existing project specs, or
  2. Cancel this approval and create a properly aligned version?

  The current document would cause implementation conflicts and break existing architecture patterns.
